canonical_title: Bad Fixture: private URL in related_public_surfaces
title: Bad Fixture: private URL in related_public_surfaces
description: A fixture intended to fail validation by including a non-public URL in related_public_surfaces, which the adapter renders into the post.jsonld mentions array.
blurb: a fixture intended to fail validation by including a non-public URL in related_public_surfaces.
one_sentence_claim: If a non-public URL appears in related_public_surfaces, the validator's public-candidate URL scan must catch it in the rendered post.jsonld.
why_this_matters: Public-safety regression test: source_trail isn't the only place private URLs can leak; canonical fields, JSON-LD mentions/about, and rendered HTML hrefs all need scanning.

demo_parameters.label: expected_outcome
demo_parameters.value: validator blocks on non-public URL in post.jsonld mentions
